name: Focaccia Bread Topping
recipeInstructions:
Salt and freshly ground pepper
1/4 pound cherry tomatoes, yellow, halved
1/4 pound cherry tomatoes, red, halved
6 ounces smoked mozzarella or scamorza, coarsely grated
1/4 cup basil leaves, thinly sliced
In a bowl, whisk together the oil, vinegar, and garlic. Season with salt and pepper.
Add the cherry tomatoes and toss together. Leave at room temperature. Can be prepared several hours ahead.
Heat the broiler.
Place cheese on top of focaccia or half loaf of Italian bread (toasted) or slices of toasted bread.
Place under broiler until cheese is melted and crust is golden.
Remove from oven and top with tomato mixture and basil. Serve immediately.
